meaning_english: Both / Two. Example: Ambidextrous (uses both hands), Ambiguous (two meanings).
Human / Mankind. Example: Anthropology (study of humans), Philanthropy (love for mankind).
Water. Example: Aquarium (water tank), Aquatic (living in water).
Hear / Listen. Example: Audible (can be heard), Audience (listeners).
Self. Example: Autobiography (self-written life story), Automatic (self-acting).
Good / Well. Example: Beneficial (helpful), Benevolent (kind-hearted).
Life. Example: Biology (study of life), Biography (life story).
Time. Example: Chronology (order of time), Chronic (lasting a long time).
Around. Example: Circumference (distance around), Circumnavigate (sail around).
Believe / Trust. Example: Incredible (unbelievable), Credible (trustworthy).
Say / Speak. Example: Dictation (saying words), Prediction (saying before).
Equal. Example: Equality (being equal), Equilibrium (balance).
Earth. Example: Geography (map of earth), Geology (study of earth rocks).
Write / Draw. Example: Autograph (self-signature), Graphite (writing lead).
Bad / Evil. Example: Malfunction (bad working), Malevolent (wishing evil).
Measure. Example: Thermometer (measures heat), Speedometer (measures speed).
Small. Example: Microscope (sees small things), Microchip (small chip).
One / Single. Example: Monologue (one person speaking), Monopoly (single seller).
Death. Example: Immortal (never dying), Mortal (subject to death).
All / Every. Example: Omnipotent (all-powerful), Omnipresent (present everywhere).
Feeling / Disease. Example: Empathy (sharing feelings), Pathology (study of disease).
Love. Example: Bibliophile (book lover), Philosophy (love of wisdom).
Sound. Example: Telephone (sound from afar), Microphone (makes sound loud).
Carry. Example: Portable (easy to carry), Transport (carry across).
Mind. Example: Psychology (study of mind), Psychiatrist (mind doctor).
Write. Example: Describe (write about), Inscribe (write on).
Far / Distant. Example: Telescope (sees far), Television (sees from far).
Heat. Example: Thermal (relating to heat), Thermostat (controls heat).
Empty. Example: Vacant (empty space), Vacation (empty/free time).
See. Example: Vision (ability to see), Visible (can be seen).
